title: Project Gallery — Adding Images
description: Add images to the Projects section to create a visual gallery. Each project should have an img tag with both src and alt attributes. Wrap at least one image in a figure element with a figcaption describing the project.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 6: Project Gallery with Images # Add img tags with src and alt. Use figure and figcaption for at least one. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

About Me | Projects | Contact

Welcome to my portfolio!

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things. I am constantly learning and love problem-solving.

SkillLevelYears
HTMLBeginner1
CSSBeginner1
PythonIntermediate2

My Projects

Here are some of my recent projects.

Contact

Get in touch with me.

""" print(html)
test_code: assert ' element' assert 'src=' in html.lower(), 'Each img must have a src attribute' assert 'alt=' in html.lower(), 'Each img must have an alt attribute for accessibility' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must wrap at least one image in a
acceptance_criteria: At least one img element with src and alt attributes
At least one image is wrapped in a figure element
A figcaption provides a description inside the figure
Images are in the Projects section
hints: An image tag:
The src can be any placeholder URL or filename
